title: 大阪杯の後に・“1番”にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet comes within a hair's breadth of
winning the Osaka Hai, but falls short of first
place. Vodka, who has briefly returned to Japan,
challenges her to a rematch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two will battle it out at the autumn Tenno
Sho, a race that holds the highest of honors for
senior racers.
